title: AWS adds managed web search to Bedrock AgentCore
friendlyTitle: AWS gives Bedrock agents built-in web search
summary: AWS announced Web Search on Amazon Bedrock AgentCore, a managed tool that lets agents retrieve current web results, snippets, source URLs, titles, dates, and metadata through AgentCore Gateway and MCP. AWS emphasizes cited grounding and zero data egress from the customer’s secured AWS environment.
friendlySummary: AWS added a managed web search tool for Bedrock AgentCore so AI agents can look up current information and cite sources while staying inside AWS controls.
whyItMatters: Enterprise agents need fresh information, but many companies cannot casually send prompts and queries to external search APIs. A governed search tool inside AWS gives teams a clearer path for research agents, support agents, and monitoring workflows that need current public facts.
friendlyWhyItMatters: This helps companies build agents that use fresh information without sending sensitive queries to random outside search tools.
